acceptance: Oregon geologic polygons loaded into geologic_units table; unit_name, formation, rock_type, lithology, age fields populated; 95%+ Oregon land area coverage
description: Ingest USGS National Geologic Map Database geologic unit polygons for Oregon via ArcGIS REST service. Fields: unit_name, formation, rock_type, lithology, age_min_ma, age_max_ma, period, description, geometry. Design ref: W-030.
title: USGS NGMDB geologic unit ingestion adapter

acceptance: Oregon land ownership polygons loaded; agency and collecting_status derived correctly; BLM=permitted, NPS=prohibited, USFS=restricted
description: Ingest BLM Surface Management Agency land ownership polygons for Oregon via ArcGIS REST service. Fields: agency, designation, admin_unit, collecting_status (derived from agency rules), geometry. Design ref: W-034.
title: BLM SMA land ownership ingestion adapter

acceptance: All endpoints return correct data; LLM tools registered and callable; geology lookup <500ms; fossil search <2s
description: Build 12 new REST endpoints (geology, fossils, land ownership, deep time) and 5 new LLM tool functions. Design ref: W-039 through W-044.
title: Geology REST API endpoints + LLM tools

acceptance: Given site with intervention history, returns forecast with confidence scores; automated accuracy scoring when next monitoring data arrives
description: Prediction engine for species returns at intervention sites using gold.restoration_outcomes and LLM reasoning. Endpoint: POST /sites/{id}/forecast.
title: Build restoration forecast engine (FEAT-002)

acceptance: Oregon fossil occurrences loaded; 5K+ records; taxon, age, collector fields populated
description: Ingest Paleobiology Database fossil occurrences for Oregon via REST API (paleobiodb.org/data1.2). Fields: taxon_name, taxon_id, common_name, phylum, class, age_min_ma, age_max_ma, period, location, collector, reference, museum. Design ref: W-033.
title: PBDB fossil occurrence ingestion adapter

acceptance: All 9 new materialized views created and queryable; medallion.py refresh handles 36 total views in correct dependency order
description: Create 3 silver views (geologic_context, fossil_records, land_access) and 6 gold views (geology_watershed_link, fossils_nearby, legal_collecting_sites, deep_time_story, formation_species_history, geologic_age_at_location). Update medallion.py and medallion_ddl.py. Design ref: W-036 through W-038.
title: Geology silver + gold medallion views

acceptance: Map renders 4 watershed sites with color-coded status; clicking site opens detail panel; observation markers render with clustering; chat interface responds to site questions
description: Map-first workspace with site polygons, observation overlays, alert indicators, detail panel with summary/forecast/recommendations, and natural-language chat. Design plan AD-4, Phase 4.
title: Build React + MapLibre map workspace (FEAT-006)

acceptance: GET /sites/{id}/fishing/species returns species with photos; GET /sites/{id}/fishing/harvest returns year-over-year trends; GET /sites/{id}/fishing/stocking returns upcoming events
description: REST endpoints for species-by-reach, harvest trends, stocking schedule, fishing conditions. Uses gold.fishing_conditions, gold.hatch_chart, gold.species_by_river_mile, pipeline/tools.py.
title: Build fishing intelligence API (FEAT-007)

acceptance: alembic upgrade head creates all 4 new tables; GiST indexes present on geometry columns; models importable from pipeline.models.geology
description: Create GeologicUnit, FossilOccurrence, LandOwnership, DeepTimeStory SQLAlchemy models and Alembic migration. GiST indexes on geometry columns. Follows existing spatial model pattern from pipeline/models/spatial.py. Design ref: plan-2026-04-10-four-product-platform.md Phase 7A, W-029.
title: Geology database models + Alembic migration

acceptance: Given site and date range, generates PDF report with executive summary, before/after species table, water quality charts, outcome KPIs
description: OWEB-format quarterly report auto-generation from gold layer data. Playwright PDF rendering. Design plan AD-6, Phase 5.
title: Build funder report generation (FEAT-004)

acceptance: alembic upgrade head produces current schema on empty DB; python -m pipeline.medallion_ddl creates all 24 views; python -m pipeline.cli refresh succeeds
description: Alembic migrations are out of sync with actual DB schema. medallion_ddl.py has 11 of 24 views. Consolidate all schema changes into proper migrations and all 24 view definitions into medallion_ddl.py.
title: Fix Alembic migration drift and consolidate medallion DDL

acceptance: All four product routes load correct layouts; shared components work across products; lazy loading per product
description: Restructure React frontend for four products: /signal (RiverSignal), /path (RiverPath), /deepsignal (DeepSignal), /trail (DeepTrail). Extract shared component library. Build DeepSignal and DeepTrail layouts. Design ref: W-045 through W-052.
title: Four-product UI architecture

acceptance: FastAPI app runs; /health returns 200; JWT validation works; role-based access enforced on test endpoints
description: Create FastAPI app with health check, Clerk/Auth0 JWT middleware, org extraction, role-based permissions per PRD FR-19 through FR-21. Design plan AD-5, AD-8.
title: Scaffold FastAPI backend with auth middleware

acceptance: Given a site and date range, returns structured ecological summary with species richness, invasive flags, water quality trends, anomaly explanations, and citations to source data. p95 < 120s.

title: Build LLM ecological reasoning agent (FEAT-001)
